html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Cholera.WC-rBS vaccine 2-dose schedule table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Booster dose was administered approximately less than 2 years ago

description.value: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Cholera.WC-rBS vaccine 2-dose schedule table in the Immunization CPG

name.value: Booster dose was administered approximately less than 2 years ago
